title: Database registration
text: A controller maintaining a database that contains information about more than 10,000 persons, or contains sensitive information, shall register the database with the Registrar of Databases.

title: Right of access
text: Every person is entitled to inspect information held about themselves in a database, and to request correction of inaccurate or incomplete information.

title: Mandatory termination notice
text: An employer terminating an employee with more than 12 months of service shall provide written notice no less than 30 days before the termination date.

title: Good faith
text: Parties to a contract shall act in good faith and in customary manner in performance of an obligation arising from a contract.

title: Unconscionable terms
text: A standard form contract term that is unconscionably disadvantageous to the customer, considering all the circumstances, may be struck out by a court.

title: Limitation of liability cap
text: A clause that limits the liability of a party for damages caused by gross negligence or wilful misconduct shall be void.

title: Unilateral amendment prohibition
text: A standard contract may not authorise the supplier to unilaterally amend material terms, including price, without the customer's renewed consent.

title: Indemnification limits
text: An indemnification obligation in a commercial contract is enforceable only to the extent that the indemnified party would itself have been liable to the third party.
